item.title: Nestapp | PWNME CTF 2023
item.description: Introduction du challenge : In order to create an API with an auth system, a developer used NestJS. He tried to follows the doc and all the good practices on the official NestJS website, and used libraries that seems safe. But is it enough ? Your goal is to read the flag, located in /home/flag.txt Tree Viewer Les sources de ce challenge sont fournies : . ├── Dockerfile ├── front │ └── index.
